scripts.dev:sandbox: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name bidkarts
scripts.db:migrate:prod: DATABASE_URL=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /bidkarts/production/DATABASE_URL --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text) psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/setup | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/setup
scripts.status:aws: aws ecs describe-services --cluster bidkarts-cluster --services bidkarts-service --region ap-south-1 --query 'services[0].{status:status,running:runningCount,desired:desiredCount,pending:pendingCount}'
